text:
Fund: HDFC ELSS Tax Saver Direct Plan Growth
Category: ELSS (Tax Savings)
Minimum SIP: ₹500
Lock-in Period: 3 Years
The minimum SIP (Systematic Investment Plan) amount for HDFC ELSS Tax Saver Direct Plan Growth is ₹500. HDFC ELSS Tax Saver Direct Plan Growth has a mandatory lock-in period of 3 Years. This is typical for ELSS funds, which qualify for tax deductions under Section 80C.
